meaning: Microsoft Certified Systems Engineer,微软认证系统工程师
examples: In addition, I have gained rich experience in CAD and passed the test for Programmers and MCSE.
Some programs lead to certification in operating certain network systems, such as a Microsoft Certified Systems Engineer (MCSE) or a Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCNA).
Our implement engineer and technology support people not only have professional technology, but also pass through many famous system certificates, such as CCNP, MCSE and so on.
In fact, my MCSE certification still ranks as one of my biggest IT career accomplishments.
